title: elymus retusus
intro: Elymus retusus, also known as the twisted wheat grass or twisted wheat grass, is a type of grass native to China that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus retusus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Elymus retusus typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
